text: A two-way ANOVA revealed a significant main effect of condition (F(1,58)=12.34, p<0.001, η²=0.18). Post-hoc tests using Bonferroni correction showed that the experimental group outperformed the control group (mean difference = 0.45, 95% CI [0.21, 0.69]).
The proposed method achieved an accuracy of 87.3% on the test set, surpassing the baseline by 12.5%. Precision and recall were 0.89 and 0.85 respectively.
